Headline: Product & Strategy
Summary: Growth leader with eight years in marketplace businesses, delivering high-impact products and programs that drive revenue growth and elevate stakeholder experience. In India, I worked at startups in consulting and healthcare to assess investment opportunities for PE clients and launch a luxury maternity hospital. Also, I built a network of ambulances to provide medical transportation to patients in need.   At OYO, a hospitality booking platform,  I led analytics for supply, finance, and marketing functions for the homestay business. Using product analytics and business understanding, I delivered customer-facing products to increase online conversion rates.   At Amazon Flex, the delivery arm of amazon.com, I created and implemented strategy programs to improve the safety of gig economy delivery drivers; served as a subject matter expert to prioritize tech and programmatic initiatives by exploring exhaustive safety concerns of XX global drivers.  I enjoy solving ambiguous problems by developing a data-driven approach to identify and drive actions and mentoring teammates to build technical expertise and a deeper understanding of the business while taking more ownership.
